description: Achievement definitions for Vessel Quest. The `check` strings are JS expressions evaluated against a stats object. See stats object schema in vessel-quest/index.html `gatherStats()`.

achievements.name: First Words
achievements.lore: Every great voyage begins with a single word set down for posterity.

achievements.name: Journal Keeper
achievements.lore: Ten entries — you've formed a habit. The logbook is no longer an obligation.

achievements.name: Steady Hand
achievements.lore: Twenty-five entries. The pen knows the page now.

achievements.name: Storyteller
achievements.lore: Fifty entries — your log reads like a tale told by a salt-weathered captain.

achievements.name: Chronicler
achievements.lore: One hundred entries. Your logbook is now a primary source.

achievements.name: Master of the Pen
achievements.lore: A quarter thousand entries. The ink barely dries before you return.

achievements.name: Sea Bard
achievements.lore: Five hundred entries. Bards will sing of you when you're gone.

achievements.name: Living Library
achievements.lore: A thousand entries — your logbook has its own gravity. The sea remembers what you wrote.

achievements.name: Long-Winded
achievements.lore: Some stories need room to breathe.

achievements.name: Variety Pack
achievements.lore: Logs aren't one-note. The sea has many voices.

achievements.name: Getting Habitual
achievements.lore: Three days running. The logbook knows your face.

achievements.name: Week Warrior
achievements.lore: Seven days. A week at sea, a week in ink.

achievements.name: Fortnight Force
achievements.lore: Two weeks unbroken. Discipline is its own reward.

achievements.name: Unstoppable
achievements.lore: Thirty days. A lunar month. The crew knows your rhythm now.

achievements.name: Iron Mariner
achievements.lore: One hundred consecutive days. The logbook is no longer yours — you are its.

achievements.name: Perpetual Voyage
achievements.lore: A full year, every single day. The sea has nothing left to teach you about persistence.

achievements.name: Wrench Turner
achievements.lore: The first repair. The engine knows your touch.

achievements.name: Shipshape
achievements.lore: Ten tasks. The boat hums a little quieter now.

achievements.name: Grease Monkey
achievements.lore: Twenty-five tasks. There's more grease under your nails than skin.

achievements.name: Engine Whisperer
achievements.lore: Fifty tasks. The engines speak to you in oil-pressure and RPM.

achievements.name: Master of Machines
achievements.lore: One hundred tasks. The boat is an extension of your hands.

achievements.name: On Schedule
achievements.lore: Not one overdue task. The schedule bows to your foresight.

achievements.name: An Ounce of Prevention
achievements.description: Complete a maintenance task before its due date
achievements.lore: The best repairs are the ones that never become repairs.

achievements.name: Anchors Aweigh
achievements.description: Plan your first trip with waypoints
achievements.lore: The first waypoint. The chart unfurls.

achievements.name: Cartographer
achievements.lore: Five waypoints. You're not just going — you're mapping.

achievements.name: Old Salt
achievements.lore: Ten voyages behind you. The sea is no longer a stranger.

achievements.name: Navigator
achievements.lore: Fifty voyages. The harbor pilot waves to you by name.

achievements.name: Atlas of the Deep
achievements.lore: A hundred voyages. You've drawn new coastlines in memory.

achievements.name: Century
achievements.lore: A hundred nautical miles. A small dip in an infinite ocean.

achievements.name: Coast Hugger
achievements.lore: Five hundred miles. You could draw the coastline from memory.

achievements.name: Long Ranger
achievements.lore: A thousand miles. Your wake is a thread across the chart.

achievements.name: Ocean Crosser
achievements.lore: Five thousand miles. You have crossed to where the horizon bends.

achievements.name: Circumnavigator
achievements.lore: Twenty-five thousand miles. The earth has circled beneath you.

achievements.name: Safety First
achievements.lore: Every box ticked. Murphy respects you today.

achievements.name: Routine Excellence
achievements.lore: Ten perfect checklists. The routine is a ritual now.

achievements.name: Belt and Suspenders
achievements.lore: Fifty checklists. You check things that don't even exist yet.

achievements.name: Liferaft Mindset
achievements.lore: The PFDs are clean, dry, and counted. Nothing else matters until this is true.

achievements.name: Number Cruncher
achievements.lore: Five fuel logs. The numbers start to mean something.

achievements.name: Fuel Accountant
achievements.lore: Twenty-five logs. You know your burn rate in your sleep.

achievements.name: Sipper
achievements.lore: Four nautical miles per gallon. The hull must be thanking you.

achievements.name: Hyper-Miler
achievements.lore: Six NMPG. Are you sailing or motoring?

achievements.name: Centurion of the Pump
achievements.lore: One hundred fuel-ups. The dock attendant knows your boat.

achievements.name: Hooked
achievements.lore: The first fish. The line taught you something today.

achievements.name: Angler
achievements.lore: Twenty-five fish. You know the patience now.

achievements.name: Fisherman
achievements.lore: One hundred fish. The tackle shop gives you the friends-and-family discount.

achievements.name: Boat Limit
achievements.lore: Five hundred fish. The deck has known every one of them.

achievements.name: Highliner
achievements.lore: A thousand fish. The sea has paid you a wage.

achievements.name: Diversity Trawler
achievements.lore: Five species in the hold. The fishmonger is intrigued.

achievements.name: More Hands
achievements.lore: Two pairs of hands. The work divides, the company multiplies.

achievements.name: Full Complement
achievements.lore: Five souls aboard. The boat is alive.

achievements.name: Rotating Cast
achievements.description: Log entries under 3+ different crew names
achievements.lore: Three names on the log. The boat has many voices.

achievements.name: Night Owl
achievements.lore: Ten night watches. The stars are old friends now.

achievements.name: Early Bird
achievements.lore: Dawn is a habit, not a surprise.

achievements.name: Midnight Scribe
achievements.description: Log an entry between midnight and 1 AM
achievements.lore: The witching hour. The pen moves when the world is asleep.

achievements.name: All Watches
achievements.description: Log entries in all 4 watches (dawn, day, dusk, night)
achievements.lore: Dawn, day, dusk, night — you've stood them all.

achievements.name: Trade Wind
achievements.lore: Three months. The seasons are starting to know you.

achievements.name: Four Seasons
achievements.lore: A full year. The boat has been your home in every weather.

achievements.name: Biennial
achievements.lore: Two full years on the water. The logbook is a documentary now.

achievements.name: Fully Equipped
achievements.lore: Logs, fuel, maintenance, trips, crew — you use the whole toolkit.

achievements.name: Perfectionist
achievements.lore: Perfection is not an act, it's a habit.

achievements.name: FishCoin Hoard
achievements.lore: Five hundred coins. The purser knows you by name.

achievements.name: On the Way
achievements.lore: A quarter of the way. The atlas is half-unrolled.

achievements.name: Completionist
achievements.lore: Half the map filled in. The other half beckons.

achievements.name: Cartographer of Self
achievements.lore: Every star on the chart is lit. The logbook is closed; the legend begins.
